TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: gaga utux Nni'an kwara hi na gaga na utux Nni'an ga hnyasun nya gaga na utux Bbwan kwe, khmey ha'iy hi na utux gaga Snlitan kwe ga, ana ci nanak utux gaga Nni'an, ana ci sa'ing tipik na gaga Snlitan mso'un ro mra' utux gaga Nni'an, sgagey iyat ga mso'un utux gaga na Snlitan ga, gaga na Nni'an musa skbaley. Pntyagan na gaga Nni'an kwe ga musa rmow yow na pns'unan, gaga na shri'an, ro yow na m'apal, ro pkuri', p'ilis cyoli, ro yow na wa kmun urow cyoli, gaga na Nni'an ga skbaley yow ro skbaley tyagan glgan mtiyow, ro pplahang inyanux Tayal. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 江明清Yawi‧Nomin, .
S.PHON: ɣaɣa utux nniʔan kwara ħi na ɣaɣa na utux nniʔan ɣa ħnjas~ɕun nja ɣaɣa na utux ββwan kwe, kħmej ħaʔij ħi na utux ɣaɣa s~ɕnlitan kwe ɣa, ana ʦ~ʨi nanak utux ɣaɣa nniʔan, ana ʦ~ʨi s~ɕaʔiŋ tipik na ɣaɣa s~ɕnlitan ms~ɕoʔun ro mraʔ utux ɣaɣa nniʔan, s~ɕɣaɣej ijat ɣa ms~ɕoʔun utux ɣaɣa na s~ɕnlitan ɣa, ɣaɣa na nniʔan mus~ɕa s~ɕkβalej. pntjaɣan na ɣaɣa nniʔan kwe ɣa mus~ɕa rmow jow na pns~ɕʔunan, ɣaɣa na s~ɕħriʔan, ro jow na mʔapal, ro pkuriʔ, pʔilis~ɕ ʦ~ʨjoli, ro jow na wa kmun urow ʦ~ʨjoli, ɣaɣa na nniʔan ɣa s~ɕkβalej jow ro s~ɕkβalej tjaɣan ɣlɣan mtijow, ro pplaħaŋ injanux tajal. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ***jawi*nomin, .
S.FORM: gaga utux Nni'an kwara hi na gaga na utux Nni'an ga hnyasun nya gaga na utux Bbwan kwe, khmey ha'iy hi na utux gaga Snlitan kwe ga, ana ci nanak utux gaga Nni'an, ana ci sa'ing tipik na gaga Snlitan mso'un ro mra' utux gaga Nni'an, sgagey iyat ga mso'un utux gaga na Snlitan ga, gaga na Nni'an musa skbaley. Pntyagan na gaga Nni'an kwe ga musa rmow yow na pns'unan, gaga na shri'an, ro yow na m'apal, ro pkuri', p'ilis cyoli, ro yow na wa kmun urow cyoli, gaga na Nni'an ga skbaley yow ro skbaley tyagan glgan mtiyow, ro pplahang inyanux Tayal. Bnrwan qa galan cpung 江明清Yawi‧Nomin, .
S.PHON: ɣaɣa utux nniʔan kwara ħi na ɣaɣa na utux nniʔan ɣa ħnjas~ɕun nja ɣaɣa na utux ββwan kwe, kħmej ħaʔij ħi na utux ɣaɣa s~ɕnlitan kwe ɣa, ana ʦ~ʨi nanak utux ɣaɣa nniʔan, ana ʦ~ʨi s~ɕaʔiŋ tipik na ɣaɣa s~ɕnlitan ms~ɕoʔun ro mraʔ utux ɣaɣa nniʔan, s~ɕɣaɣej ijat ɣa ms~ɕoʔun utux ɣaɣa na s~ɕnlitan ɣa, ɣaɣa na nniʔan mus~ɕa s~ɕkβalej. pntjaɣan na ɣaɣa nniʔan kwe ɣa mus~ɕa rmow jow na pns~ɕʔunan, ɣaɣa na s~ɕħriʔan, ro jow na mʔapal, ro pkuriʔ, pʔilis~ɕ ʦ~ʨjoli, ro jow na wa kmun urow ʦ~ʨjoli, ɣaɣa na nniʔan ɣa s~ɕkβalej jow ro s~ɕkβalej tjaɣan ɣlɣan mtijow, ro pplaħaŋ injanux tajal. βnrwan qa ɣalan ʦ~ʨpuŋ ***jawi*nomin, .
